title: [v4.0] Cirrus: Update VM Images for 4.0 release
body:
This is to ensure VM images for CI, which contain the
intended dependency versions to support the podman
4.0 release.

Ref: https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/114

comments.body: @mheon [I backported a fix](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/13214) from main here to (hopefully) address failing tests.  Hope this doesn't mess up your release-notes or anything.  Either way, I'm still seeing similar problems (test failures) as in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/13055

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v4.0/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

LGTM
but I'll let @mheon decide about the merge button press
